aesthetic_description: Clean dark mode, minimalist professional, operator/hacker console style. High data density, functional beauty, no flashy effects. Focus on clarity, reliability, and speed.

rules.h1: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-mono tracking-tighter uppercase font-bold

surfaces.glassmorphism: Not recommended for this archetype. Stick to solid dark grays and stark borders.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Grid-based, dense, high utility. Everything aligned on a strict modular grid.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align data. Right-align numbers/metrics in tables.

buttons.primary: bg-yellow-500 text-black font-mono uppercase tracking-widest text-xs px-4 py-2 rounded-none hover:bg-yellow-400 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 text-zinc-300 font-mono uppercase tracking-widest text-xs px-4 py-2 rounded-none hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white transition-colors

inputs.style: bg-black border border-zinc-800 rounded-none text-zinc-100 font-sans p-3 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-yellow-500 focus:border-yellow-500 focus:outline-none placeholder:text-zinc-600

tables.header: text-xs font-mono text-zinc-500 uppercase tracking-wider border-b border-zinc-800 pb-2

badges.style: px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-mono uppercase border rounded-none

motion.hover: Subtle border color changes and text brightness increases. No scaling or bouncing.

media.notes: Rely entirely on typography, data visualization, and spacing. No stock photos.

testing.rules: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based.

command_center.layout: Centralized, dominant view. A large input area mimicking a terminal.
features: Type selector (Task, Deal, Note) via hotkeys or small command bar buttons
Recent entries feed below with monospace timestamps

dashboard.layout: MODE B: The Control Room Grid. 4 columns.
features: Top row: Summary metric cards (border-collapse style)
Middle row: Activity Feed (col-span-2), Priority Tasks (col-span-2)

deals.layout: Dense data table. Hide non-essential columns on smaller screens.

features: Prose typography for readability (IBM Plex Sans)

daily_review.layout: Timeline view with vertical dashed lines.
features: Chronological list of the day's entries

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI. Keep borders square (rounded-none).
Install Google Fonts: JetBrains Mono and IBM Plex Sans.
Build the Command Center as the root route ('/'). It is the primary interaction point.
Ensure the layout has a persistent sidebar or top navigation bar for switching between modules.
Implement a clean, fast data store (e.g., SQLite via Prisma, or local storage if frontend-only, but problem statement implies backend is needed. Keep models aligned with the requested fields.)
Ensure all forms and buttons have data-testid attributes.
Do not add complex auth. Assume a single-tenant/single-user environment.
Apply the background_css utility class to the main app wrapper for a subtle hacker grid.
